productTitle: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Machine Pro Max
name: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Machine Pro Max
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Machine Pro Max
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Machine Pro Max – Enterprise Gateway with UniFi OS
short_description: Quad-core ARM Cortex-A57 at 2.0 GHz, 8 GB RAM, 32 GB storage, (8) 1 Gbps + (1) 2.5 Gbps RJ45, (2) 10G SFP+, NVR with hot-swappable SSD bays
description: Quad-core ARM Cortex-A57 at 2.0 GHz, 8 GB RAM, 32 GB storage, (8) 1 Gbps + (1) 2.5 Gbps RJ45, (2) 10G SFP+, NVR with hot-swappable SSD bays

detailed_description.heading: Unparalleled Network Performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Dream Machine Pro Max is a high-performance network gateway designed for managing large and complex networks. It goes beyond the capabilities of the standard Dream Machine Pro, offering significant upgrades in processing power, memory, routing performance, and security features. This all-in-one solution simplifies network management while delivering exceptional performance and scalability. Equipped with a powerful multi-core processor and 10 Gbps SFP+ ports, the Dream Machine Pro Max delivers exceptional routing speeds of up to 5 Gbps with full IDS/IPS enabled. This ensures smooth and seamless network traffic management even under heavy loads. The Dream Machine Pro Max boasts advanced switching capabilities with its built-in 8 Gigabit LAN ports and 2 SFP+ ports. This robust switching capacity allows you to connect multiple devices and experience lag-free network performance for various applications. The Dream Machine Pro Max integrates advanced security features like Integrated Threat Detection/Prevention System (IDS/IPS) and Deep Packet Inspection (DPI). These features help identify and block malicious traffic, protecting your network from cyber threats and unwanted intrusions.

detailed_description.heading: Network Recording with Built-in NVR
detailed_description.text: The Dream Machine Pro Max features a redundant Network Video Recorder (NVR) functionality with hot-swappable SSD bays. This allows you to record video footage from security cameras and access recordings directly through the UniFi Protect application, ensuring reliable video storage and playback. The integration of network security and video recording allows you to monitor both network activity and video surveillance feeds from a single platform, enhancing overall security management and situational awareness. The Dream Machine Pro Max can support a large number of Ubiquiti UniFi Protect cameras, making it suitable for comprehensive video surveillance solutions in various environments.

detailed_description.heading: Centralized Management
detailed_description.text: The Dream Machine Pro Max runs on Ubiquiti's user-friendly UniFi OS, offering a unified platform to manage your entire network. This intuitive interface allows you to easily configure network settings, monitor network health, and access advanced features, all from a single dashboard. The Dream Machine Pro Max integrates seamlessly with other Ubiquiti UniFi devices such as access points, switches, and security cameras. This allows for centralized management and configuration, simplifying network administration and maintenance. The Dream Machine Pro Max boasts an impressive capacity, supporting up to 200+ UniFi devices and 2,000+ client connections. This makes it ideal for managing large-scale network deployments, including corporate offices, multi-tenant buildings, and educational institutions.
